message: Jake
Cindy
Tim
Hey, detective, what’s up?
What does that even mean?
Oh, sorry.
I just imagined something unpleasant for a moment.
Oh, you really came to hang out!
That’s not exactly it, though.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
The surroundings
About work
Things
Gloria
About her mom
Things
About that
Gloria
About Meryl
To another place
Save
Exit the game
There’s a single-sized bed, and all that’s left are a table and chairs. They must be the stuff that was originally in the apartment.
The view from the window shows barely a sliver of sky, with the rest being nothing but the dirty walls of a building.
With her earnings, it wouldn’t be hard to rent a better room than this.
You’re worried about her, huh?
It’s not exactly a place you could call safe. Is it really okay to leave a girl all alone in a place like this?
She's such a good girl.
I can't believe someone like her is living in this dirty showbiz world.
Still,
maybe she would have been happier not becoming an actress.
Sure, she's got a pretty face and might act with the skill of an adult, but her true self is a naive young girl.
Choosing a boring guy over quitting acting is like ruining her life.
Isn't it?
She seems calmer than the last time we met. I wonder how long it'll take before she agrees to meet her mother.
Hey, the audition is coming up soon.
Since she's at practice, I’m home alone. It's so boring.
They're doing their best, so can't we just support them?
I get that, but I want you to pay a little more attention to me.
Well, I can't say I don't understand.
Right?　Ah.
Ah, I really want the audition to be over soon.
It's so boring until the audition ends.
How about going back to work once it's over?
No way!
Being 'normal' might actually be really exhausting.
You don't plan on going back to work?
You always say things like that. It's my life, so let me do what I want.
Ah!
There's just one thing I'm curious about, the filming...
What's going on?
The filming is
being postponed for later.
I see.
But what did they say to make us wait? Is the director really furious?
Gloria is handling it with her quick thinking, so it's alright.
What did they say?
She was rescued after being held captive by an obsessive fan, but she's extremely exhausted and needs rest.
Wow.
That's tough.
I wonder if no one has caught on?
You could just return as you are right now, you know?
I'm not going back. I’ve already decided.
But isn't it boring?
I’ve always longed for a normal life like this, so it's okay. It really is okay, this ordinary life like now.
It really is okay.
I don’t want anything to do with that kind of world!
You know, you haven’t hung out with me at all lately. What a letdown.
But that can’t be helped.
But I don’t want that.
Maybe,
I actually don't want to audition, you know?
Why do you think that?
Because I forced you to audition. I feel like I made the wrong choice. I honestly didn’t expect a band like that.
What do you mean by a band like that?
Wearing race outfits and putting on makeup like a girl. It makes me feel so gross.
But you’re auditioning knowing that, right?
Because I told you to go.
Ah, what if I actually get in?
Hey, can you imagine?
Me in drag and putting on makeup.
So why not just not let me audition at all?
That won’t work. There might,
be a chance meeting with someone important who notices your talent.
It might be bad if I passed or failed.
Ugh, it’s complicated.
I've forgotten all about Gloria.
That's harsh, treating someone who discovered you like that.
You can only support her because you don’t know anything.
Sure, I don’t know much about you guys,
but I think she has her own side to it too.
So, detective, are you someone who can treat anyone equally, no matter who they are?
Well, that's a tricky one.
I don't really know. But I think I'd try to approach it with that mindset as much as possible.
But you can't really know, right? In reality.
In the end, that's just how it is.
After the audition, you'll consider meeting your mom, right?
Yeah.
After the audition, for sure.
But honestly, what's the point of this now?
That's how I feel.
I'm 16, you know? I'm turning 17 this year! So what? It's too late to be told about my birth mother now.
Haven't you been told anything? You know, by your parents or relatives?
It seems my mom and dad had few connections. I don't think there are any relatives. Plus, my parents passed away a long time ago.
Yeah, that's true.
Living for 16 years without knowing and then suddenly having someone show up would be really confusing.
Right?
Hey, what kind of person is your mom, detective?
I don't know how to describe her.
Uh.
Well, she was gentle and easygoing.
Ah, you used past tense.
Does that mean she’s passed away?
No, she's alive.
So, has she become a scary mom compared to before?
No, I haven't seen her for about three years.
Huh?
W-Why?
Why do you ask?
Come on, isn't that fine?
No way, you need to tell me properly!
Come on, you have to confess!
Forget about me.
No way, if you don't tell me, I will never meet my biological parents. Is that okay with you?
Ugh.
You see, I've been disowned by my parents.
Disowned?
Yes, disowned.
So I haven't seen my parents' faces in a long time. I think they’re alive since I haven't heard anything from them.
That's a really sad situation. If they were dead, I could accept that, but not being able to meet them while they’re alive is really heartbreaking.
Thanks, but I'm okay. I'm fine.
I.
I might have misunderstood you, detective. I'm sorry.
Surrounded by dirty adults and working, she has a complicated family situation. It might be a bit harsh for a teenage girl.
It might be a miracle that she has grown up so innocently.
I haven't told her that her real mother is Meryl, you know. I totally get that she'll be shocked.
Can she forgive Meryl?
Right now,
it seems like she's consumed with that. I think it's amazing to be so selfless as to be able to throw away her entire career and life.
That situation,
I can't possibly see how it could be a plus for her. After the breakup for those girls,
what will happen to her?
Until his audition is over, anything said will be useless. For now, it seems the only option is to leave him alone.
But.
I just can't believe he has any special talent.
If.
Even if he manages to grasp a foothold for success, it will be thanks to.
his support.
He probably won't ever be able to forget that. After all, I just can't see these two being happy together.
I think.
Whatever happens, it's not something I should concern myself with.
It's not an issue I should interfere with.
Is Gloria still
looking for her?
Or,
does she know where she is and is deliberately leaving her alone?
Gloria really has it tough.
But it seems things haven't been going as well as she thought.
What kind of reaction would Meryl have if she knew that is her abandoned daughter?
A major actress whose beauty and popularity are beginning to fade, and a rising star with incredible momentum. It's a strange fate.
She does not have good feelings towards her birth mother. Well, that's only natural.
Honestly, wouldn't it be better for both of them if Meryl and
didn't meet?
In any case, it’s alright to put Meryl and
on the back burner. Worrying about it won't change anything.
Come visit again.
※※※ It's a bug. ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
